properties.name: studio.features.thumbnail.enabled
properties.description: Enable the thumbnail generation platform service.

properties.name: studio.thumbnail.default-size
properties.description: Default thumbnail maximum side length in pixels.

properties.name: studio.thumbnail.default-format
properties.description: Default thumbnail output format. Currently png is supported.

properties.name: studio.thumbnail.min-size
properties.description: Minimum thumbnail maximum side length in pixels.

properties.name: studio.thumbnail.max-size
properties.description: Maximum thumbnail maximum side length in pixels.

properties.name: studio.thumbnail.max-source-size
properties.description: Maximum source document size accepted by thumbnail generation. Human-readable values such as 10M are accepted.

properties.name: studio.thumbnail.max-source-pixels
properties.description: Maximum decoded source image or PDF page pixels accepted by thumbnail generation.

properties.name: studio.thumbnail.renderers.pdf.enabled
properties.description: Enable PDF thumbnail rendering when PDFBox is on the classpath. Disabled by default because PDF parsing/rendering processes complex external input.

properties.name: studio.thumbnail.renderers.pdf.page
properties.description: Zero-based PDF page index to render as the thumbnail source.

deprecation.reason: Thumbnail generation defaults moved to the platform thumbnail service.
Thumbnail generation defaults moved to the platform thumbnail service.
